memory:memory/2026-04-13.md:1:6.snippet: - Telegram Mini App falling-block prototype: FPS is now reported as normal after two accepted performance passes; remaining user-visible issue shifted to UI clarity on high-DPI devices, specifically iPhone 16 Pro in Telegram Mini App. - Clarity pass was accepted: added capped Phaser render resolution based on devicePixelRatio (capped at 2), enabled autoRound, and increased Phaser.Text resolution in GameScene via applyUiTextResolution(); README updated; fresh production asset hash after this pass was index-szObg1cR.js. - Current production URL remains https://telegram-tetris-prototype-1776008249.netlify.app and is used by the Telegram Mini App bot path. - Local uncommitted files after clarity
